goalSummary.oneLine: Drive Mother's Day gift set purchases in the United States with a conversion-focused campaign targeting ROAS efficiency.

channelMix: Search for high-intent gift and skincare queries
Performance Max for scaled conversion reach
Remarketing for site visitors and cart abandoners
audienceKeywordDirections: Segment search intent into generic gift, skincare gift set, premium gift, and last-minute delivery terms
Prioritize gifting audiences and recent site visitors
flightPlan: Warmup: gift guide and category discovery
Peak: strongest offer and bestseller push
Final push: shipping urgency and last-minute messaging

sellingPoints: Premium skincare gifts she will love

descriptions: Shop elegant skincare gift sets with free gift wrap and Mother's Day delivery.
Find thoughtful gifts for mom with limited-time savings and premium presentation.

launchActions: Review search term quality within the first 3 days
Add negatives for low-value bargain traffic
Shift budget toward high-ROAS product intent groups
Swap in urgency-focused copy during final push
assumptions: Landing page supports Mother's Day merchandising and gift wrap messaging
openQuestions: Is there a product feed available for Performance Max or Shopping inventory?
